metadata.description: Information Logistics skill plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: claude-pip
plugins.description: Performance Improvement Plan for Claude. Type CLAUDE PIP to lock in a behavioral discipline (TDD, plan mode, sub-agents, adversarial review) as a deterministic rule in the project's CLAUDE.md.

plugins.name: tufte-love
plugins.description: Tufte-style audits, redesigns, and reviews for data visualizations, dashboards, and quantitative UI.

plugins.name: jtbd-prd
plugins.description: Validate customer need before you build. Produces a Job Article that functions as PRD framing, grounded in Jobs-to-be-Done evidence.

plugins.name: estimatrix
plugins.description: Effort and complexity sizing rule. Express estimates as T-shirt sizes (XS / S / M / L / XL / XXL), never as hours or days.

plugins.name: mrkrabs
plugins.description: STUB. Model cost routing and telemetry. Tracks LLM spend across tiers, routes by confidence, persists sessions, exposes a terminal dashboard.

plugins.name: learn2kern
plugins.description: STUB. Typography skill. Generates modular type scales from a base size and ratio, recommends pairings, audits kerning and tracking, emits token files in CSS / Swift / Compose / W3C.

plugins.name: semantic-organization
plugins.description: Meta-skill that governs how every skill is structured. Codifies folder roles, naming rules, and migration triggers. Scaffolds new skills, audits existing ones, recommends when a folder should become a sibling skill.
